executives.name: Michael Fraser
executives.background: Mike Fraser was appointed as CEO and Executive Director of Gold Fields effective 1 January 2024. Prior to joining Gold Fields, he was the CEO of Chaarat Gold Holdings and previously served as Chief Operating Officer at South32.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Executive Director

executives.name: Alex Szabo
executives.background: Alex Szabo was appointed as CFO and Executive Director effective 1 December 2023. He previously served as the Senior Vice President: Group Financial Controller at Gold Fields.

executives.name: Martin Preece
executives.background: Martin Preece served as Interim CEO from January 2023 to December 2023 and is currently the Chief Operating Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President: South Africa / Interim CEO

executives.name: Cheryl Carolus
executives.background: Cheryl Carolus has been a member of the Board since 2009. She has held various leadership positions in the public and private sectors in South Africa.

executives.name: Ian Cockerill
executives.background: Ian Cockerill has over 45 years of experience in the global natural resources industry. He previously served as CEO of Gold Fields and Anglo Coal, and was a non-executive director of Endeavour since 2019 before being appointed CEO.

executives.name: John MacKenzie
executives.background: Mr. MacKenzie has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Prior to the business combination of Capstone Mining and Mantos Copper, he was the Executive Chairman of Mantos Copper. He previously served as CEO of Copper for Anglo American.

executives.name: Philisiwe Sibiya
executives.background: Philisiwe Sibiya was appointed to the Board in 2019. She is the former CEO of MTN Cameroon.

executives.name: Steven Reid
executives.background: Steven Reid has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was formerly Chief Operating Officer of Goldcorp Inc. and has held senior positions at Placer Dome and BHP.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Non-Executive Director / Lead Independent Director

executives.name: Yunus Suleman
executives.background: Yunus Suleman was appointed to the Board in 2016 and became Chairperson in 2022. He is a Chartered Accountant and former Chairperson of KPMG South Africa.

executives.name: Charl Keyter
executives.background: Charl Keyter was appointed executive director and CFO of Sibanye-Stillwater on 1 January 2013. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry and previously held various senior financial roles at Gold Fields Limited.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Group Head of International Finance

board_of_directors.name: Yunus Suleman
board_of_directors.background: Yunus Suleman was appointed to the Board in 2016 and became Chairperson in 2022. He is a Chartered Accountant and former Chairperson of KPMG South Africa.
committees: Capital Projects Control and Review Committee

board_of_directors.name: Cheryl Carolus
board_of_directors.background: Cheryl Carolus has been a member of the Board since 2009. She has held various leadership positions in the public and private sectors in South Africa.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Reid
board_of_directors.background: Steven Reid was appointed to the Board in 2016. He has over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Non-Executive Director / Lead Independent Director

committees: Capital Projects Control and Review Committee

board_of_directors.background: Mr. MacKenzie has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Prior to the business combination of Capstone Mining and Mantos Copper, he was the Executive Chairman of Mantos Copper. He previously served as CEO of Copper for Anglo American.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Fraser
board_of_directors.background: Mike Fraser was appointed as CEO and Executive Director of Gold Fields effective 1 January 2024. Prior to joining Gold Fields, he was the CEO of Chaarat Gold Holdings and previously served as Chief Operating Officer at South32.
